Package com.commercetools.api.models.error

Class GraphQLLineItemQuantityBelowLimitErrorBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.commercetools.api.models.error.GraphQLLineItemQuantityBelowLimitErrorBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Builder<GraphQLLineItemQuantityBelowLimitError>
public class GraphQLLineItemQuantityBelowLimitErrorBuilder extends Object implements Builder<GraphQLLineItemQuantityBelowLimitError>
GraphQLLineItemQuantityBelowLimitErrorBuilder
Example to create an instance using the builder pattern 

     GraphQLLineItemQuantityBelowLimitError graphQLLineItemQuantityBelowLimitError = GraphQLLineItemQuantityBelowLimitError.builder()
             .quantity(1)
             .minCartQuantity(1)
             .build()
